title: HR Pipeline having a 'contact' option
excerpt: I am creating different recruitment and onboarding pipelines, but I am finding it annoying having to include the email and phone column in every pipleline so there is less back and forth. Is there an option of adding a ‘…

posts.author: Briennennapoli (Briennen Napoli)
posts.cookedHtml: I am creating different recruitment and onboarding pipelines, but I am finding it annoying having to include the email and phone column in every pipleline so there is less back and forth. Is there an option of adding a ‘contact’ that can be linked to the workflow? (e.g. adding a contact of someone who is in the recruitment and onboarding process, so I can click on the column of their contact and it shows the mobile, email, dob etc.). So far my only solution is uploading their CV to each different pipleline but this would be a lot more streamline for me!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Add a ‘connected’ column and select the candidates then use mirror columns to pull in phone email etc
